title: Assistant Manager (NUHS@Home)(6339)
description:
Join us in our mission to transform the healthcare landscape in Singapore! We - the NUHS@Home team - are a dynamic new home hospital service looking for passionate and innovative administrative staff to co-create with us.

As an Assistant Manager for NUHS@Home, you will play a vital role in the coordination and management of our patients' care. We're looking for people with new ideas and a can-do attitude. People who are willing to think outside the box and embrace innovation. People who never give up and are always striving to improve. If you're a proactive problem-solver who is passionate about healthcare and wants to be part of an exciting new home hospital service, we want to hear from you.

Job Responsibilities

  • Oversee and manage financial counselling operations for NUHS@Home.
  • Liaise with Billing Office on billing matters, including clarifications on patient bills and tagging of inpatient codes.
  • Supervise daily ground operations in the Ops Room to ensure smooth workflows.
  • Manage logistics, procurement, onboarding/offboarding, and administrative coordination with internal stakeholders (e.g. Legal, Communications) and external partners/vendors.
  • Support programme expansion through stakeholder engagement and vendor management, including feedback for process improvement.
  • Optimise and streamline operations workflows to improve efficiency and service delivery.
  • Lead and facilitate ground operations meetings.
  • Undertake other ad hoc projects and administrative tasks as required.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s degree in any discipline.
  • Strong communication, planning, and coordination skills.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office and digital platforms.
  • Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.
  • A team player with a positive attitude who can also work independently.
  • Prior experience in healthcare or hospital operations will be an added advantage.

postedCompany.description:
The National University Health System (NUHS) plays a key, contributing role in Singapore’s healthcare. Our versatile and experienced team of healthcare professionals has only one aim - to help people get better, and live healthier and longer lives.

We do this by improving medical care, lowering disease recurrence, producing better healthcare professionals, and turning research findings into better medical treatments for diseases that affect Singaporeans. And the reason we’re able to do these things is because we have the best and most dedicated people. Come join us and help shape medicine for our future.
postedCompany.name: NATIONAL UNIVERSITY HEALTH SYSTEM PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
